reviews.school_name: St Josephs Convent School - New Industrial Township 5

school_address.streetAddress: NH -5, Kasak, New Industrial Twp 5, New Industrial Township, Faridabad, Haryana 121001, India

reviews.author: Karman
reviews.review_body:
I changed schools after 10th grade ( currently in 12th grade) because I was really disappointed with this school. The teachers there were not fair and treated students unfairly based on their own opinions. They were not open-minded or liberal in their thinking. It felt like they only valued certain viewpoints and didn't encourage free thinking.
Education should be about exploring different ideas and perspectives, but this school limited that.

Moreover, the sports department was also a letdown. The sports teachers lacked proper coaching skills and didn't motivate us to excel in our chosen sports. This affected our overall physical development and enjoyment of sports activities. It's crucial for a school to have supportive and skilled sports teachers who encourage students to stay active and healthy

All in all, my experience at that school was not a positive one. The biased teachers and inadequate sports instruction pushed me to switch schools. Education should be about growth, acceptance, and learning, but this school fell short in these areas.

On the positive side, I must admit that the low fees at school did attract many students and parents. It made education more accessible, especially for those who were financially constrained. However, it became apparent that the low fees might have been reflective of the overall quality of education and extracurricular activities provided.

It's important to note that everyone's experience can vary, and different people might have/had different opinions about the school. However, based on my own experience, I made the decision to switch schools after completing the 10th standard. I believe that a more open-minded and dedicated teaching approach, as well as a better sports program, would have made a significant difference in my overall educational journey

reviews.school_name: St Josephs Convent School - New Industrial Township 5
reviews.author: Abhishek Virmani
reviews.review_body:
This school is so pathetic that they turnoff fans of Kids , they are made to suffer and sit in hot and humid weather. Whereas Air conditioners of Principal’s room stay on.
Even sometimes kids have reported that they are made to sit on floor in corridors.
They call themselves English Medium but condition is poorer than a govt hindi medium school.
I request parents to stop believing in such schools and highlight this issue to CBSE.
*source of info is my nephew*
Studying in class 7th.
